rows.label: qev087406_MSG0001
rows.name: Huh~ Commander Vandham is dozing off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087406_MSG0002
rows.name:
He's on duty-mo! Tatsu
cannot forgive this-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087406_MSG0003
rows.name:
We should let him rest. He probably
doesn't get many opportunities like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087406_MSG0005
rows.name:
It just means NLA is
that peaceful, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087406_MSG0006
rows.name: Why-mo? Tatsu doesn't really get it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087406_MSG0007
rows.name:
Looks like he made the arrangements
before falling asleep.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087406_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're right[ST:wide ]— He really is someone who
takes care of the details, isn't he?[ST:wait ]
